items.title: Senior Product Manager - Delivery Management
items.jd_full: The Senior Product Manager - Delivery Management role involves leading the product vision, strategy, and roadmap for Delivery Management capabilities focusing on OT/ICS environments. Responsibilities include customer engagement, product feature development, stakeholder collaboration, and go-to-market strategy. Requires 5+ years of product management experience in enterprise security or related domains, cloud, DevOps, hardware appliances, and excellent analytical and communication skills.

items.title: Product Manager Engagement
items.jd_full: Sparteo is a European AI-powered advertising technology company seeking a Product Manager Engagement. The role involves defining and implementing optimization strategies for core product solutions, focusing on ad format optimization, A/B testing, native advertising, UX enhancement, and compliance.
